parsed_data.summary: The team discussed the mobile app redesign timeline and scope, deciding to expand the project to include authentication flow fixes along with onboarding improvements. The release date was pushed back one week to April 22 to accommodate the additional work.
decisions: Include authentication flow fix in the redesign project
Target April 22 for redesign completion instead of April 15
Dark mode feature will be deferred to Q3

action_items.task: Complete and deliver user research report
Update project plan to reflect April 22 target
Add dark mode to Q3 backlog in Jira
Set up meeting with Sarah and Priya to discuss pricing page

open_questions: How to address the confusing pricing page mentioned by customers
